refinements.kbve.discordsh.SubmitServerRequest.serve: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
refinements.kbve.discordsh.SubmitServerRequest.name: .min(1, 'Server name is required').max(100, 'Server name must be 100 characters or less')
refinements.kbve.discordsh.SubmitServerRequest.summa: .min(1, 'Summary is required').max(200, 'Summary must be 200 characters or less')

fieldOverrides.kbve.discordsh.SubmitServerRequest.descr: z.string().max(2000, 'Description must be 2000 characters or less').optional()
